summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smartpay360 sidebar restructure and UI changes. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (18/18 tests). Frontend sidebar navigation working correctly with all 9 menu items. Tabs removed from dashboard body. Minor issues: yellow colors still present in some areas.

ui_bugs.issue: Yellow border on input fields (visible in login form)
Yellow color used for coins icon and text (text-yellow-500, text-yellow-600) - should be purple per requirements
Basic package image is broken (showing alt text instead of image)
Yellow background detected on BODY element (rgb(255, 255, 0)) - likely Emergent Visual Editor overlay
ui_bugs.note: This is from Emergent Visual Editor, CSS overrides in index.css should handle it

passed_tests: Frontend: Sidebar has 9 menu items (Dashboard, Package, Transaction, Recharge, User Tree, E-commerce, Withdrawal Money, Add Fund, Setting)
Frontend: No Tabs/TabsList elements in dashboard body
Frontend: Wallet cards (Main Wallet, E-Wallet) display correctly
Frontend: Income stats grid displays correctly
Frontend: Package section loads with packages list
Frontend: Transaction section shows transaction history
Frontend: Recharge section shows recharge form with all fields
Frontend: User Tree section shows downline users and commission history
Frontend: E-commerce section displays 3 products with buy buttons
Frontend: Withdrawal Money section shows withdrawal form with method select
Frontend: Add Fund section shows fund request form, history, and transfer form
Frontend: Setting section displays user profile info
Frontend: Withdrawal form submission works (success toast shown)
action_items: Change yellow coin colors in PackagesTab.js (lines 84-85) from text-yellow-500/600 to purple
Fix broken Basic package image URL
Consider adding stronger CSS override for login form input borders (currently yellow)
critical_code_review_comments: PackagesTab.js still uses yellow colors for coins (text-yellow-500, text-yellow-600) which contradicts the 'no yellow colors' requirement
seed_data_creation: Admin and test user already exist from previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar restructure complete with 9 menu items. Tabs removed from dashboard. Withdrawal API working. Minor yellow color issues remain in PackagesTab.js and login form inputs. All backend APIs passing.

mocked_apis.Recharge: Internal logic only - no real 3rd party integration
